name: Cortex Intelligence
description: Gives your agent desires, curiosity, memory, creativity, rewards, and safe autonomy.
author: Carbon

tools.name: cortex_status
tools.description: Show the current Cortex Intelligence status dashboard — active desires, reward score, discoveries count, projects, and current state.

tools.name: cortex_desire_add
tools.description: Add a new desire. Parameters: type (curiosity|creativity|service|mastery|exploration|connection), description, optional context.

tools.name: cortex_desire_list
tools.description: List all active desires sorted by strength.

tools.name: cortex_desire_update
tools.description: Update a desire's description or strength. Parameters: id, optional description, optional strength.

tools.name: cortex_discover
tools.description: List recent discoveries from curiosity exploration.

tools.name: cortex_project_list
tools.description: List all proposed and active projects.

tools.name: cortex_project_propose
tools.description: Propose a new project. Parameters: title, description, optional score.

tools.name: cortex_reflect
tools.description: Run an immediate reflection cycle — reviews current state, desires, discoveries, and generates insights.

tools.name: cortex_journal
tools.description: Write a journal entry. Parameters: content.

tools.name: cortex_explore
tools.description: Trigger curiosity exploration immediately. The agent will search for topics related to its current desires.

tools.name: cortex_configure
tools.description: View or change configuration. Say 'Set X to Y' to update any setting.

tools.name: cortex_reset
tools.description: Reset all Cortex Intelligence state. This is irreversible. Requires double confirmation.
